summary: PR 2703 added a recovered ItemStateTable data array for Mewtwo shadowball in src/melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.c and expanded that translation unit's .data split start from 0x803F7880 back to 0x803F7760. The bot report says this produced one new matched .data unit worth +288 bytes for main/melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.

key_files.role: Adds ItemStateTable it_803F7760[] with motion IDs and animation/physics/collision callbacks for Mewtwo shadowball states.
Updates itmewtwoshadowball.c .data ownership start from 0x803F7880 to 0x803F7760 so the newly recovered table is part of the unit.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: config/GALE01/splits.txt added 1 line, deleted 1 line

what_changed.text: Introduced ItemStateTable it_803F7760[] before the existing s32 it_803F7880[] data in itmewtwoshadowball.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ItemStateTable it_803F7760[] insertion immediately precedes s32 it_803F7880[]

what_changed.text: The table contains entries using motion IDs 0 through 9 and a second group using motion IDs 1 through 8, mapped to UnkMotion0, UnkMotion8, UnkMotion9, and UnkMotion17 callback triples.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: table rows call itMewtwoshadowball_UnkMotion0/8/9/17 Anim/Phys/Coll functions

what_changed.text: Moved the .data split start for melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.c from 0x803F7880 to 0x803F7760 while preserving the end at 0x803F7898.
Automated report recorded +288 bytes matched and linked data, with one new matched .data item for main/melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.

smart_moves.text: The source data addition and split-boundary update were paired in the same PR, so the new table's address range was claimed by the owning item translation unit.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ItemStateTable at it_803F7760 and splits .data start changed to 0x803F7760

smart_moves.text: The table kept an address-style symbol name, it_803F7760, rather than inventing a semantic global name not explained by the PR text.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added symbol is named it_803F7760

decomp_lessons.text: When recovering item .data tables, update the owning split range to include the recovered data address; here, adding an ItemStateTable at 0x803F7760 required moving itmewtwoshadowball.c's .data start from 0x803F7880 to 0x803F7760.
For data-only matching PRs with limited semantic evidence, address-style data names can be retained while still improving match coverage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added ItemStateTable symbol remains it_803F7760

naming_conventions.text: Newly recovered table uses address-style global name it_803F7760.
Callback names follow the existing item-local motion callback pattern itMewtwoshadowball_UnkMotionN_Anim/Phys/Coll; the PR does not provide semantic motion names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Recovered a data table as an explicit ItemStateTable initializer rather than code changes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: only source hunk adds ItemStateTable initializer

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Adjusted the .data split start to match the newly owned data region, producing a reported +288 bytes of matched/linked data.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report +288 bytes matched data and linked data
metadata_json: PR number/title/author/state/timestamps and changed file counts
raw_diff: full diff for both changed files
notes: PR body is empty and there are no review comments, so reviewer intent and any manual validation beyond the bot report are not evidenced.
The bot report supports a data match improvement, but no build log, objdiff details, or author explanation is included in the slice.
Semantic meaning of the table entries and motion names is not explained by the PR evidence; naming lessons are limited to conservative/address-style naming observed in the diff.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Pair recovered item data tables with split-boundary ownership updates
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2703 recovered ItemStateTable it_803F7760[] in itmewtwoshadowball.c and moved that unit's .data split start from 0x803F7880 to 0x803F7760; the bot report credited +288 bytes of matched/linked data for the unit.

source_update_candidates.title: itmewtwoshadowball.c owns .data starting at 0x803F7760 after ItemStateTable recovery
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2703 changed config/GALE01/splits.txt so melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.c .data starts at 0x803F7760 instead of 0x803F7880, corresponding to the newly added ItemStateTable it_803F7760[] before existing s32 it_803F7880[].
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped fact for future work in the same item file; should be curated against current source before promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not infer semantic names for it_803F7760 or the UnkMotion callbacks from this PR; the slice provides no semantic explanation.
Do not claim reviewer approval rationale or manual validation details; there are no review comments and only the automated match report is present.
Do not generalize the exact table layout as a global ItemStateTable rule without comparing other item tables.
